channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - Industry News
channel.description: Latest Industry News news in Context Engineering

item.title: Configurable Reward Model for Balanced Safety Alignment
item.description: arXiv:2605.30487v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Aligning large language models (LLMs) to heterogeneous and rapidly evolving safety requirements remains a critical challenge. Existing instruction-tuned LLMs and standalone safety classifiers often fail to generalize to new safety configurations, moti...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, LLM, arxiv, large language model, alignment | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: QASM-Eval: A Dataset to Train and Evaluate LLMs on OpenQASM-3 Beyond Quantum Circuits
item.description: arXiv:2605.30358v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Quantum computing remains in the Noisy Intermediate-Scale Quantum (NISQ) era, where the performance is highly constrained to noise. Addressing the limitation often requires hardware-facing capabilities beyond gate-sequence circuit specification, inclu...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, LLM, arxiv, large language model, fine-tuning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: NumLeak: Public Numeric Benchmarks as Latent Labels in Foundation Models
item.description: arXiv:2605.30393v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Public numeric benchmarks appear in pretraining, so an evaluation that conditions on a date may be measuring memorized recall rather than out-of-sample skill. We introduce NumLeak, a measurement framework that combines API-boundary probes on productio...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> API, release, LLM, arxiv, framework | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: mcp-agent - Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns
item.description: Build effective agents using Model Context Protocol and simple workflow patterns<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> model, context | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 60%</small>

item.title: Introducing Mellum2: A 12B Mixture-of-Experts Model by JetBrains
